title: Fix custom emoji click in picker

log.context: Fix custom emoji click in picker

Good -- standard unicode emoji buttons still use `onClick` (SolidJS delegation), which is fine since they contain text, not images. Here's a summary of what was done: **Problem:** Clicking custom emojis in the "Your Emojis" section of the emoji picker did nothing -- neither added reactions nor inserted into message input. **Root cause:** SolidJS event delegation (`onClick`) routes click events through a single document-level handler.
